headline: A Look At Generac Holdings (GNRC) Valuation After Data Center Engine Upgrade Tailwind
summary: A recent upgrade from a major investment bank has put fresh attention on Generac Holdings (GNRC), after analysts pointed to the company’s role supplying heavy-duty engines for commercial data centers and a potential large hyperscaler contract. See our latest analysis for Generac Holdings. The Jefferies upgrade has landed after a strong run, with a 30 day share price return of 27.34% and a year to date share price return of 98.82%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 125.23% sits alongside...
